title: Fishy Bears
description: Makes Polar Bear Fish Randomly on ice (Giving them a use and making them more ambient)
body:
Join the discord for any suggestions/to see progress on updates/new mods/ etc. 

Makes Polar Bears more ambient and gives them a use by letting them fish on ice. 

Server-Side only, and works without fabric API. 

 

 

A polar bear "fishing" and eating the fish. This heals them for 1 heart. They will do this 2/3rds of the time they catch a fish.

 

 

 

A polar bear dropping the fish.  They will do this 1/3rds of the time they catch a fish. If they catch any item that's not a fish they also drop it. (They use the fishing loot table which you can see here)

 

 

 

Polar bears don't fish IRL(Unless they're desperate or they find dead fish) unlike their grizzly cousins, I just thought this would be a cool feature for Minecraft :P
